summary: Iteration 25 frontend testing complete. All four new Waves eMotion-LV1-inspired features verified end-to-end: per-channel scribble-strip color tag (9 categories, picker on SelectedChannelPanel, applied to both ChannelStrip & InputStrip), CLR SOLO global wipe, TALK push-to-talk (pointer-down/up), and live Clock (HH:MM:SS, updates each second). Migration of older saves (no category field) is idempotent and assigns 'none' to every channel. Read-only mode correctly disables both new TopBar action buttons. No regressions observed on existing TopBar testids (scene-bar, proactive-hint, pn-type-pink/white/sweep, master controls, channel strip mute/solo/fader).
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx mixes default React import with React.useState/useEffect inside the Clock subcomponent — works but inconsistent with the named import style used elsewhere. Cosmetic only.
InputStrip category tag uses w-[74px] hardcoded width but the strip container is w-[88px]; pixels-perfect on Chromium but consider matching ChannelStrip pattern (full-width band).
Clock uses setInterval(1000) so the visible seconds can be ~1s out of phase with wall clock — acceptable for a live-show wall clock.

talkback flag is persisted to localStorage along with the rest of dsp_state_v1; if a tab is closed while TALK is held the saved state will boot with talkback=true. Consider resetting talkback to false on hydrate to guarantee program audio is never silently dimmed on next boot.
Lots of 'AudioContext was not allowed to start' console warnings before first user gesture — harmless but noisy. Could wrap audio engine init behind a one-time gesture handler.
seed_data_creation: Used page.evaluate to mutate localStorage 'dsp_state_v1' for migration + input category tests; no persistent backend seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-25 acceptance criteria PASS. TopBar testids: top-clr-solo, top-talk, top-clock. SelectedChannelPanel testids: sel-category-group + sel-category-{none|mic|vox|drum|bass|gtr|key|fx|aux}. Per-strip tag testids: out-out_phy-0-category-tag (output) and in-in_phy_0-category-tag (input). To select an output for the panel, do NOT click [data-testid=out-out_phy-0-name] (the input has stopPropagation) — instead click the surrounding header area, e.g. page.locator('[data-testid="channel-strip-out_phy_0"]').locator('text=PHYSICAL').first.click(force=True). TALK push-to-talk should be exercised via dispatch_event('pointerdown') + dispatch_event('pointerup') because page.click triggers them too fast to observe. Talkback transitions and category state are observable via localStorage 'dsp_state_v1'. Test results matrix: solo_in_before=true, solo_out_before=true, solo_in_after=false, solo_out_after=false, talkback_during=true, talkback_after=false, readonly_clr_disabled=true, readonly_talk_disabled=true, all 9 swatches visible, vox category set+tagged with 'VOX' pink band, persisted across reload, none removes tag from DOM, input category tag 'MIC' cyan visible, migration idempotent (all channels get category:'none').
